case_manifest.name: seed-table-fasta-ablation-v0
case_manifest.table_policy: leave FASTA out of canonical preset training, then replay ablations

fasta_cases.name: fasta-original-replay
fasta_cases.description: current generated FASTA bytes with synthetic headers intact

fasta_cases.name: fasta-header-scrubbed-sequence
fasta_cases.description: same sequence lines and wrapping with header vocabulary replaced by deterministic hex IDs

fasta_cases.name: fasta-sequence-only-wrapped
fasta_cases.description: headers removed; sequence lines and wrapping preserved

fasta_cases.name: fasta-sequence-only-concat
fasta_cases.description: headers and FASTA syntax removed; sequence bytes concatenated

fasta_cases.name: fasta-header-only-control
fasta_cases.description: original headers retained while sequence lines are deterministic random ACGTN

fasta_cases.name: fasta-header-scrubbed-random-sequence-control
fasta_cases.description: headers scrubbed and sequence lines replaced by deterministic random ACGTN

fasta_cases.name: fasta-header-scrubbed-shuffled-sequence-control
fasta_cases.description: headers scrubbed and per-record bases shuffled while counts and wrapping are preserved

replay_control_cases.name: shadow-json-control-replay
replay_control_cases.description: existing paired shadow-vocabulary control from seed-table replay

replay_control_cases.name: binary-tlv-control-replay
replay_control_cases.description: existing binary TLV control from seed-table replay

replay_control_cases.name: binary-varint-control-replay
replay_control_cases.description: existing binary varint control from seed-table replay

case_manifest.sequence_lane_reopen_rule: header-scrubbed sequence and at least one sequence-only row must be negative, all controls must be non-negative, canonical rows must beat sha256 baseline, and selected spans must be mostly sequence-attributed

summary.claim_boundary: No Seed Search; bounded FASTA attribution ablation only; not natural-corpus proof; not production proof; not .tlmr format support.
summary.conclusion: The sequence lane can reopen only if header-scrubbed and sequence-only FASTA rows stay negative while controls remain null and selected spans are mostly sequence-attributed.
